message.content:
@startuml
title Update States

participant "Simulator" as Simulator #LightGreen
box Wayside Controller #lightgrey
  participant TrackControllers #LightGreen
  participant WaysideController #LightGreen
  participant PLC #LightGreen
end box
participant WaysideControllerGUI #LightGreen
participant TrackModel #LightGreen

== timeUpdate(SimTime) ==
activate Simulator
loop waysideControllers 
    activate TrackControllers
    
    note over TrackControllers,WaysideController : updateStates()
    
    loop associatedBlocks
        
        receiveBlockInfo(line, blockId)<--WaysideController:TrackControllers
        getBlockInfo(line, blockId)->>TrackModel:WaysideController
        Block<..- -WaySideController:TrackModel
        Block<- -- WaySideController:TrackControllers
        
        runPLC(occupancy)- ->WaysideController:WaysideController
        getLogic()-> >PLC:WaysideController
        String logic <- .. PLC:WaysideController
        
        if(newState != currentState) then
            
            transmitState(line, blockld,state)-->>TrackControllers:WaysideController
            setState(line,blockld,state)->>TrackModel:WaysideController
            Success <-- . . TrackModel:WaysideController
        end if
        
    end loop 
    
    alt(Way side Controller Selected ) 
        
       display Info()- >>Way Side Controller GUI:Ways ide controller  
       
      Receive Blo ck info(l ine ,b lock Id)<<---Wa ysideContro llerGU I:w ay si de co ntrol ler
      
     receiv eBl ockIn fo(li ne,blo ckl d)& lt;<<----wa ys id ec ontr olle r:T rack Con tro ll ers
     
   ge tB lo ckI nf(o lin,e bl oc k ld )->>-Tr ac km od el: W ays i dec ont ro lle
   
 Bl okc <<-...T ra kc mo del: Wa syi edcon trll er
 
Blokc <—.wasyiedcontrollerrackcontrlers
  
BlocK->&g;t.WasycotnrollerGUiwasdecoontoller


endif



@enduml
